mnemonics.title: SOLVE Method
mnemonics.content:
S - State the recurrence clearly
O - Obtain homogeneous solution (set d=0)
L - Find particular solution (assume constant A)
V - Combine both solutions
E - Use initial condition to find constant

acronyms.expansion: Homogeneous H part + Particular N part

visualTips.visualization: Think of aₙ as points on exponential curve: each step multiplies by c, creating a curve that grows (c>1) or decays (|c|<1)
Think of number line: each step adds constant d, creating equally spaced points
Imagine water flowing in and out: input d, output through leak c×value. Equilibrium when inflow = outflow

analogies.analogy: Like bacteria in a petri dish - each generation multiplies by growth factor (c) plus new arrivals (d)
Each period: previous balance earns interest (multiply by c) plus new deposit (d), creating compound growth with regular additions
